title: Fault Code 1: Power Supply Fault
summary: Power supply fault causes complete unit shutdown.
evidence_quote: 1 电源故障  机组全停

title: Fault Code 8: Water Flow Switch Fault
summary: Water flow switch fault causes unit shutdown protection.
evidence_quote: 8 水流开关故障  机组停机保护  仅1#模块检测

title: User Parameter: Cooling Leaving Water Setpoint
summary: Cooling leaving water setpoint default 7°C, range 5-12°C.
evidence_quote: 04 制冷出水设定温度  7℃ 5℃-12℃ 控制出水时有效

title: Maintenance Parameter: Defrost End Temperature
evidence_quote: 01 除霜结束温度 Te ≥25℃ 0℃-50℃ 翅片温度

title: Maintenance Parameter: Compressor Minimum Run Time
summary: Compressor minimum run time default 120 seconds, range 30-600 seconds.
evidence_quote: 19 压缩机最短运行时间  120秒 30-600秒

title: Cooling Startup Sequence
summary: Cooling startup: water pump on, 30s delay, check flow switch, oil preheat, water temp, restart delay, then start fan and compressor sequentially.

sequence: 检查油预热时间条件是否满足

evidence_quote: 1 开水泵 2 延时30s，检测流量开关 3 检查油预热时间条件是否满足 4 检测水温 5 检测再启动延时时间 6 开1#风机，延时3s 7 开1#压缩机

title: High Pressure Lockout After 3 Trips in 2 Hours
summary: If high pressure switch trips 3 times within 2 hours (excluding defrost), the system locks out and requires manual reset.

structured_payload.condition: 高压开关在2小时内跳开次数累计3次（除霜时不计入）
structured_payload.action: 高压报警锁定，需人工故障复位

evidence_quote: 在2小时内开关跳开次数累计3次《除霜时不计入，除霜高压跳时不报警系统退出除霜、但压缩机停止运行，等高压开关闭合≥5分钟自动复位，之后重新判断是否需要加载》，控制板默认系统存在故障，便高压报警锁定

title: DIP Switch S1 Configuration for Module Address
summary: Module address set by S1 bits 1-4: OFF OFF OFF OFF = module 1, ON OFF OFF OFF = module 2, etc.

structured_payload.module_address: 一号模块: OFF OFF OFF OFF

evidence_quote: OFF OFF OFF OFF 一号模块

title: Manual Fault Reset via Clear Key
summary: For non-auto-reset faults, press and hold the Clear key on the wired controller for 5 seconds to reset.

structured_payload.procedure: 通过线控器上的〈清除〉键（持续5秒）进行故障复位

evidence_quote: 对于不可自动恢复的故障，可通过线控器上的〈清除〉键（持续5秒）进行故障复位
